audit_name: NeurIPS Research Study - Full App Audit

backend_api.note: All 15 endpoints return 2xx (clinical-agent 404 is correct for non-existent patient)

issues_found_and_fixed.description: DATABASE_URL pointed to port 15432 (Docker) but PostgreSQL runs on 5432
DATABASE_SSL_MODE defaulted to 'prefer', local PG rejects SSL upgrade
Frontend build fails: ClinicalFact.text property does not exist (4 occurrences)
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Removed f.text fallback, concept_name is the correct display field

issues_found_and_fixed.description: POST /research/experiments crashes: CurrentUser treated as dict (.get() called on dataclass)
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed type annotation from dict to CurrentUser, use .id instead of .get('sub')

issues_found_and_fixed.description: Research experiment enum case mismatch: SQLAlchemy uses names (DRAFT) but DB stores values (draft)
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Added values_callable=lambda e: [x.value for x in e] to all 3 Enum columns

issues_found_and_fixed.description: GET /graph/stats crashes: concepts_by_domain has None keys from DB query
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Filter out None keys/values before constructing GraphStatsResponse

issues_found_and_fixed.description: kg_nodes missing patient_id_encrypted column (model added it, migration not applied)
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: ALTER TABLE kg_nodes/kg_edges ADD COLUMN patient_id_encrypted VARCHAR(500)

issues_found_and_fixed.description: GET /patients crashes when props has mrn=None (dict.get returns None instead of fallback)
issues_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed props.get('mrn', ...) to props.get('mrn') or props.get('fhir_id') or ''
Applied via alembic upgrade head (with manual intervention for 3 conflicts)

known_limitations: research/datasets page does not exist in frontend (datasets are API-only)
useLlmSettings hook does not exist (settings page uses direct fetch)
clinical-agent/query requires existing patient data (returns 404 for non-existent patients)
20 test-only TypeScript errors (jest type mismatches) - do not block build
Next.js 'middleware' file convention deprecation warning (should migrate to 'proxy')
